name: Access token is rejected after logout
statusMessage:
XFAIL Access token remains valid after logout (see issue #10)

AssertionError: assert 200 == <HTTPStatus.UNAUTHORIZED: 401>
 +  where 200 = <Response [200 OK]>.status_code
 +  and   <HTTPStatus.UNAUTHORIZED: 401> = HTTPStatus.UNAUTHORIZED

testStage.statusMessage:

 +  where 200 = <Response [200 OK]>.status_code
 +  and   <HTTPStatus.UNAUTHORIZED: 401> = HTTPStatus.UNAUTHORIZED

labels.name: tag
labels.value: @pytest.mark.xfail(reason='Access token remains valid after logout (see issue #10)', strict=True)
